name: kafka-connect-ibmmq
title: Kafka Connect IBM MQ Source
description: The IBM MQ Source Connector is used to read messages from an IBM MQ cluster and write them to a Kafka topic. It is included in Confluent Platform (Enterprise Edition), or can be downloaded and installed separately. It can be used for free for 30 days, but after that does require an Enterprise license. Contact Confluent for more details.

support.summary: This connector is a Confluent Commercial Connector and supported by Confluent. The requires purchase of a Confluent Platform subscription, including a license to this Commercial Connector. You can also use this connector for a 30-day trial without an enterprise license key - after 30 days, you need to purchase a subscription. Please contact your Confluent account manager for details.
